km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស, uណៃteត គីnហ្គដុម

zh.lifeSummary: Jeffery de Grey於1230年出生在英國英格蘭。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1290年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jeffery de Grey于1230年出生在英国英格兰。他至少有1个女儿。他去世于1290年在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Jeffery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Geoffrey , common in the Middle Ages (as reflected in surnames such as Jefferson). This is now the usual spelling of the name both in North America and Britain. Well-known bearers include the novelist and former British politician Jeffrey Archer ( b. 1940 ), the British conductor Jeffrey Tate ( b. 1943 ), and the American soul singer Jeffrey Osborne ( b. 1951 ).

variants.name: Jeffry
meanings: Variant spelling of Geoffrey , common in the Middle Ages (as reflected in surnames such as Jefferson). This is now the usual spelling of the name both in North America and Britain. Well-known bearers include the novelist and former British politician Jeffrey Archer ( b. 1940 ), the British conductor Jeffrey Tate ( b. 1943 ), and the American soul singer Jeffrey Osborne ( b. 1951 ).

en.lifeSummary: Jeffery de Grey was born in 1230, in England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1290, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Jeffery de Grey est né en 1230, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1290, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Jeffery de Grey wurde 1230 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1290 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Jeffery de Grey è nato il nel 1230 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1290, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeffery de Greyは1230年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1290年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeffery de Grey(은)는 1230년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1290년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Jeffery de Grey nasceu em 1230, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1290, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Jeffery de Grey родился в 1230 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1290 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Jeffery de Grey nació en 1230, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1290, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
